ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regulatory_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulatory domain */,
  "rule_number" TEXT /* The regulatory rule number */,
  "rule_subject" TEXT /* Subject matter of the rule */,
  "citation" TEXT /* The specific citation for the rule */,
  "citation_subject" TEXT /* Subject of the citation */,
  "citation_title" TEXT /* Title of the citation */,
  "regulatory_entity" TEXT /* The regulatory entity responsible for the rule */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the regulation */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the regulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the regulation (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_citation_subject FOREIGN KEY ("citation_subject") REFERENCES citation_subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_regulatory_entity FOREIGN KEY ("regulatory_entity") REFERENCES regulatory_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_rule_subject FOREIGN KEY ("rule_subject") REFERENCES rule_subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES regulatory_domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule subject */,
  "parent_subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subject (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation the citation belongs to */,
  "cfr_usc_citation" TEXT /* The CFR/USC citation */,
  "last_amended_date" TEXT /* The last date the citation was amended */,
  "cross_reference" TEXT /* Cross-reference to other related citations or regulations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the citation subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the citation subject */,
  "parent_subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subject (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory entity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory entity */,
  "parent_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent entity (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., compliance officer, legal expert, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the permission */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation the permission applies to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the regulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission used for access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)
